sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48525" key="qesmofulaki<k>o/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεσμο-φῠλᾰκι[κ]ός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype><sense id="n48525.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"><cit TEIform="cit"><quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">, νόμος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.292d</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
